name: Cloth travel bag
description:
Hermes Orange Toile Canvas and Leather Acapulco
Messenger Bag.

It is designed in a messenger style with a slouchy but functional silhouette. This bag is crafted from canvas and leather in a pleasing orange hue. It features a front slip pocket, a top zip fastening and an adjustable shoulder strap. The bag is super spacious and comes with a smooth fabric-lined interior that houses a zip pocket for little essentials. Complete silver-tone hardware, this ergonomic bag is ideal for work and vacations. It's a unisex bag.

Interior Material: Fabric
Length :22.5 cm
Width :5.5 cm
Height :26.5 cm
Strap: up to 66cm
Hardware :Silver Tone
Exterior Material :Canvas and Leather
AUTHENTIC made in FRANCE

**minimal sign of wear
Pre-loved Condition
Comes with generic dustbag
